description: SN5 naming lint config (AlembicPlugin, ported from the SN2/SN3 shape). Codifies THIS repo's as-found dominants per SN0 user gate #1 (codify, do not redesign): lib modules are camelCase (middleware/util positions), PascalCase (class/contract positions), or kebab (the MCP tool/contract module family: output-contract.ts, agent-public-tools.ts, error-taxonomy.ts); snake_case and mixed-case-kebab are blocked everywhere in lib. bin entrypoints, scripts (incl. scripts/lib), and configs are kebab-case. test/ filenames are mixed as-found (PascalCase.test.ts dominates but kebab fixtures live) and stay unscoped until an SN wave censuses them, mirroring the SN2/SN3 decision. vendor/ and dist/ are never scanned (scan roots are explicit). Exceptions require {file, owner, reason}.

rules.label: lib modules are camelCase/PascalCase or kebab (no snake_case, no mixed-case kebab)
